titleStmt.title: SII 5.784: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 784. (A.R. No. 220 of 1895). ON A SLAB FROM TIRUVANNUR IN THE SAME BUNGALOW.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . ko śrīvāḷairāmarkkuc cellāniṉṟa yāṇṭu nālāmāṇṭaik ketir
nālu Avvāṇṭu Irāmavaḷanāṭu vāṇṇapāliyattu kaṇṇaṅ kaṇṭaṉum paṇiyuṭai
yavakaḷum Aṟunūṟṟuvarun niḻalorum pāṭṭāṟ ceyta kāriimāvatuRead kāriyamāvatutirumuṉṉūrp
paṭārar melkaṇaiyapaḷḷi y(ā)kkañ cellaṉ koḷḷa veṇṭumeṉṟa poṉ paṇṭillātatu ko
ḷḷa veṇṭāteṉ ṟoḻiñcār Ippaṭārarmel Evvakaippaṭṭa(ṭa)tuṅ koḷḷapeṟār nāṭuvāḻumava
ṉum paṇiyuṭaiyavakaḷuna tirumuṉṉūrp paṭāraruṭaiya tevattuvamum piramattuvamum Aṟunūṟ
ṟuvarkkum kiḻiṭu Itiṉukku kiḻiṭṭu kāṇam Oru nantāviḷak kerikkakkaṭavār Ūrāḷa
rippaṭārarkkey Ippaṭārarkku Aṟunūṟṟuvarum Oru nāḷai yuri koṇṭu Ārātiṉai ceyvikkakka
ṭavar Ippaṭāraruṭaiya Iṭaiyiṭu tirukkuṇavanoṭokka yilakkikkakaṭavar Aṟunūṟṟuvarum
Itiṉukku nallitun tiyituṅ kaṇṭu celuttakkaṭavaṉ Uḷpāṭu ceyyumavaṉ Ippaṭā
rak kaṭutta tevakāriyavun tariccirukkil potuvāḷ ceṉṟu ceṉṟatu viṭṭikkoṭukkakkaṭavar A
ṟunūṟṟuvarum viṭṭikkoṭātavaṉ tirukkuṇavāyc celluñ celnaṭai muṭṭiccorvoru
ṉuṅ kāṭaṉtoṭṭam Aṟunūṟṟuvarkkum pālaiyūro ṭokkum Akanāḻiyeccelaviṉāṉ Ak
koyilkaṉmip poruḷ kavarvituñ ceyyumurāḷaṉ Irupattaiṅ kaḻañcu poṉ taṇṭa Aṟunūṟṟuvarkku .
Digital edition of SII 5.784 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
